rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use boolean helper declarations to express value range conditions in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees in AGREE should reference valid component ports or visible variables.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and their expressions in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` to define boolean helper variables for range checks in AGREE.
Wrap AGREE annex content in `annex agree { ... };` syntax.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings or subcomponent ports in component type contracts.
Do not use unbounded or abstract expressions in type scope AGREE contracts.
